=== ABYSS CODENAME: APEX OVERRIDE SYSTEMS ===

 -> restore --theme light

=============================================

sanity_diagnostics.log.content:
[CLASSIFIED MILITARY DIAGNOSTIC // SUBJECT: AFFAN]
Timestamp: 2026-05-24 21:38:47
Human Emotional Response: 4.2% (Critical Degradation)
Neural Synapse Acceleration: +412% over baseline.
Cognitive Matrix: Heavily fractured by predatory instincts. If human ego drops below 1%, total behavioral collapse is imminent.

incident_redacted.txt.content:
[INCIDENT REPORT: AREA-09 OUTBREAK]
Status: ARCHIVED // TOTAL SECRECY ENFORCED
Subject Affan entered state [APEX_PREDATOR_V3]. Casualty Assessment: Hostile units eliminated: 100%. Allied support squads: 0 survivors. Nearby Civilian Sanctuary: [REDACTED]. Every structure within a 3km radius flattened. Do not leak to Light Novel channels.

video_training_apex.dat.content:
[CLASSIFIED VIDEO ARCHIVE // CODENAME: APEX TRAINING FLIGHT]
Captured footage of Subject Affan engaging in high-intensity combat synchronization maneuvers with combatant Elio Zaynezz. Residual energy outputs completely saturated the optical sensors of the recording drone. Playback interface initialized below.

core_stabilizer.log.content:
[LOG RECOVERY // SYS-CORE-02]
Experimental neural dampeners attached to Subject Affan failed within 12 seconds of Apex activation. The sub-dermal inhibitors melted due to localized kinetic friction. Subject manifested a sudden burst of pure void mass. Engineering team recommends abandoning physical containment frameworks.

trauma_matrix.txt.content:
[PSYCHOLOGICAL MATRIX DATA // ENCRYPTED]
Memory parsing reveals deep temporal distortions. Subject Affan continuously relives combat loops that never happened in our current timeline. The presence of 'Elio Zaynezz' acts as both an emotional anchor and a highly volatile catalyst. Synergy levels are dangerously anomalous.

prototype_apex_v1.dat.content:
[PROJECT ALPHA FILES: CODENAME PRE-APEX]
Early tracking records from Affan's childhood development stages. Subject displayed zero natural predator impulses until the localized collapse event. The awakening was not biological—it was an injected variable from an unknown outer continuum.

observer_casualty.log.content:
[INTERNAL MEMO // DEPT OF QUANTUM TRACKING]
Three field observers sent to record Subject's skirmish vanished from local space. No bodies recovered. Only their recording glasses remained, permanently fused into solid carbon glass blocks. Residual heat radiation reading: 4500K.

collateral_void.txt.content:
[ENVIRONMENTAL DAMAGE ANALYSIS]
Regions exposed to Affan's prolonged Apex presence exhibit a decay in standard physics rules. Local gravity fluctuates by +/- 18%. Light refraction bends inward toward the Subject's coordinates. The world is physically giving way to accommodate his existence.

execution_transcript.txt.content:
[TRANSCRIPT ENGAGEMENT LOG // 0x77B]
Unidentified Enemy Leader: 'What... what are you?'
Subject Affan: [No spoken vocalization audio caught]
[Sound of heavy bone acceleration, followed by sudden decompression of cabin atmospheric seal]
[RECORDING TERMINATED: DATA BLOCK WIPED]

final_liminal_state.log.content:
[PREDICTIVE THREAT ASSESSMENT MODEL]
If Subject encounters an existential threat that forces an unthrottled Apex release, the localized web application matrix will experience absolute logic corruption. Reality sync status: UNSTABLE. Monitor closely.

sacred_relic_67.dat.content:
[CLASSIFIED VISUAL DATA // CODENAME: RELIC 67]
Visual documentation of the anomaly. The surrounding digital fabric exhibits intense radiation bleaching. Prolonged observation of this file may cause localized neural desync. Rendering visual core...
